name: sample-wasi-http-js
description: Sample project demonstratingu JS project targeting WASI http
author: Tomasz Andrzejak

scripts.build: npm run bundle && componentize-js --wit wit -o dist/$npm_package_name.wasm dist/bundle.js
scripts.build:hono: npm run bundle -- --input src/server-hono.js && componentize-js --wit wit -o dist/$npm_package_name.wasm dist/bundle.js
scripts.serve: npm run build && wasmtime serve -S common dist/$npm_package_name.wasm
scripts.serve:hono: npm run build:hono && wasmtime serve -S common dist/$npm_package_name.wasm
